utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: You are so cute ! How did you get to be so cute ?

emotion_cause.span: 1_You are so cute ! How did you get to be so cute ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Well , my Grandfather was Swedish and my Grandmother was actually a tiny little bunny .

emotion_cause.span: 1_You are so cute ! How did you get to be so cute ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Okay , now you are even cuter ! !

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: You know that is a popular opinion today I must say .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: The weirdest thing happened at the coffee house , I think , I think Phoebe was hitting on me .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: I am telling you I think Phoebe thinks I am foxy .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: I am sorry it is just , Phoebe just always thought you were , you were charming in a , in a sexless kind of way .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Oh , you know I ... I can not hear that enough .

utterances.speaker: Monica

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: No , I did not misunderstand , okay ? She was all over me ! She touched my bicep for crying out loud !
